defaultDescription: civic-pulse tracks government promises, parliamentary activity, and ministerial performance from official sources. This is the open-source demo with illustrative data.
fallbackNoticeText: The full interactive content loads after JavaScript executes. This page preserves the key information for search indexing.

/.title: civic-pulse - government accountability tracker
/.description: Open-source government accountability platform. Track promises, parliamentary activity, and ministerial performance from official sources.

/deputetet.title: civic-pulse - parliamentary members and activity
/deputetet.description: Roster of legislators with activity metrics, topic coverage, and intervention history sourced from official transcripts.

/qeveria.title: civic-pulse - government and ministry performance
/qeveria.description: Cabinet org chart, ministry profiles, and per-portfolio scores based on tracked promises, progress, and the most recent updates.

/methodology.title: civic-pulse - methodology
/methodology.description: How the platform monitors promises: mission, editorial standards, sources, scoring logic, and reproducible metrics.

/privacy.title: civic-pulse - privacy policy
/privacy.description: Privacy notice: analytics, cookies, and the handling of minimal technical data.

/contact.title: civic-pulse - contact and corrections
/contact.description: How to submit corrections, cite official sources, and report concerns about data accuracy.

templates.ministryDescription: Profile of the {portfolioLower} ({minister}) with linked promises, progress, and recent updates.
templates.deputyDescription: Profile of {name}: topics discussed and parliamentary activity history sourced from official records.
